exercises.title: Create a Basic HTTP Server
exercises.description: Create a Node.js HTTP server that responds differently based on the request URL. It should serve a home page at '/', an about page at '/about', and return 404 for any other path.

exercises.title: File System Operations
exercises.description: Create a script that reads a file, modifies its content, and writes it to a new file. Handle errors properly if the file doesn't exist.

exercises.title: Build a Simple API Server
exercises.description: Create a Node.js server that serves JSON data for a list of users. Include functionality to get all users and get a user by ID.

summary: These exercises progress from basic HTTP server creation to file system operations and API development. They cover core Node.js concepts including HTTP handling, file I/O, and JSON API responses.
